cards.title: Guarantee and Gap
cards.governance_note: Document approximation ratio, additive error, relative gap, bound source, and acceptable threshold.

cards.title: Assumptions and Feasibility
cards.governance_note: Verify constraints, assumptions, metric conditions, rounding feasibility, and edge cases.

cards.title: Trade-Off Governance
cards.governance_note: Assign decision authority for accepting accuracy-cost trade-offs and domain consequences.
